user.title: Connect to your 2N intercom
user.description: Enter the connection details for your 2N device. Ensure the HTTP API is enabled and a user with Directory access is configured under Services → HTTP API on the device.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Doorman
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for **{host}** are no longer valid. Enter new credentials to restore the connection.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host and that the HTTP API is enabled.

multiple_devices_no_selector.message: Multiple Doorman devices configured — specify the 'device' field (config entry ID) to target one.

no_write_permission.title: Doorman: directory write unavailable on {device_name}
no_write_permission.description:
The API user `{username}` cannot write to the 2N device directory on **{device_name}**. Create, edit, and delete operations are disabled.

**To fix:** In the 2N web interface go to **Services → HTTP API**, find the API user, and enable **System API** with **Control** access. Access log, switch control, and user viewing will continue to work in the meantime.

create_user.name: Create user
create_user.description: Add a new user to the 2N directory.

delete_user.name: Delete user
delete_user.description: Remove a user from the 2N directory.

grant_access.name: Grant access
grant_access.description: Open an access point immediately, bypassing credential checks.
